candidate_definition_hints.text: Sample ASP.NET Core 10.0 reference application, powered by Microsoft, demonstrating a domain-centric application architecture with monolithic deployment model.
This Microsoft reference application is now being maintained by [NimblePros](https://nimblepros.com/).
